dungeon: GENUINE ROTF edited 'best-moments' compilation (RuinedBow channel — heavy editing overlays VEXED/RAGE/ANCIENT/LEGENDARY/GODLY rarity cards, a 'Damage Counter: You Dealt X% damage' HUD, quick cuts). Chat readable. HEADLINE: a PENTARACT TOWER run + Oryx realm-announcer taunts that name his guardian bosses + a ROTF-custom DAMAGE-%-CONTRIBUTION loot + Token system. Mostly base-game content captured on a ROTF server, not a new-boss recovery.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-minimaps+frames (multi-arena compilation): (1) the PENTARACT TOWER — a CIRCLE of multi-coloured CHECKERBOARD tiles with a short entry STEM at the bottom (the classic Pentaract colourful-tile arena), fought from open centre; (2) a FIRE/LAVA circular arena (orange/red disc with dark RADIAL SPOKE lines from the centre); (3) a large CUSTOM map shaped like a FACE/logo (brown disc with two eyes + a red mouth, a 'WEP...' banner) — a meme/decoration map; (4) grey HEXAGONAL boss arenas + a brown circular arena with a central tree-like structure and 4 radial corridors; (5) green grass REALM hub. Compilation -> arenas catalogued individually, not a single sequence.

bosses.name: Pentaract
phases: 5-arm tower fight on the coloured-tile arena; arms destroyed individually
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames (approx, edited): the arena fills with SCATTERED radial bullets (white) — consistent with the Pentaract's per-arm RADIAL fire; reconstruct as multiple fixed radial-nova emitters (one per arm). Clean per-arm geometry not isolated due to editing overlays.
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-sighting: the colourful-tile arena + Oryx's 'Behold my Pentaract, and despair!' confirm a PENTARACT dungeon on this ROTF server. Pentaract is BASE-GAME RotMG -> not a new boss; documented as present. No Pentaract-spoken taunt (it is silent base-game); the 'Behold my Pentaract' line is OryX's, see Oryx entry.

bosses.name: Rock Construct
taunts: We are impervious to non-mystic attacks!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (Pentaract-arena minion line). Likely base-game/standard armored-add flavour; recorded verbatim.

bosses.name: Oryx the Mad God (realm announcer)
taunts: My 13 Ghost Kings give me more than enough protection!
The Sentry that has gazed the realm for years is sure to RIP YOUR SOULS OUT!
My Hermit God's thousand tentacles shall drag you to a watery d[eath]!
You are food for my minions!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (orange 'Oryx the Mad God:' realm-invasion announcer lines, each boasting about a guardian boss — Pentaract, Ghost Kings, The Sentry, Hermit God). HONESTY FLAG: these read like Oryx REALM-TAUNT flavour and several may be CANONICAL base-game RotMG Oryx lines rather than ROTF-custom -> recorded verbatim but NOT claimed as ROTF-original; verify against base RotMG Oryx taunt list before treating any as custom. 'You are food for my minions!' is confirmed base-game. The 'watery death' line is right-edge cut.

drops: Maxed Potion of Defense (auto-sent to potion storage)
Maxed Potion of Attack (auto-sent to potion storage)
Legendary Quest token (from a full stack Token)
mechanics: DOCUMENTED ROTF-CUSTOM SYSTEMS (the real value of this tag): (1) a DAMAGE-%-CONTRIBUTION LOOT system — every loot line is tagged 'with X% damage deal!' and a 'Damage Counter: You Dealt X% damage' HUD tracks your contribution (RuinedBow soloing shows '100% damage deal!'); loot rarity is celebrated with ANCIENT/LEGENDARY/GODLY overlays. (2) a TOKEN loot system — 'obtained a Legendary Item from a full stack Token', plus an admin 'Turned off token loot, its a bit spammy' line (so loot Tokens are toggleable/spammy). (3) Maxed potions auto-route to potion storage ('Maxed Potion of Defense, sending to potion storage (393/500)'). (4) Oryx realm-announcer taunts naming guardian bosses (Pentaract/Ghost Kings/Sentry/Hermit God). Pentaract Tower (colourful-tile circle) confirmed present; Rock Construct minion 'impervious to non-mystic attacks!'.
uncertain: This is an EDITED compilation (rarity/status overlays + quick cuts) -> attack geometry is only approximate (scattered radial nova read for the Pentaract; per-arm pattern not isolated). The Oryx announcer lines may be CANONICAL base-game RotMG Oryx taunts, NOT ROTF-custom -> flagged, not claimed as original. No NEW named boss with a custom taunt recovered (Pentaract/Rock Construct are base-game). 'Hermit God's thousand tentacles' line right-edge cut. The face-shaped 'WEP' map and fire radial-spoke arena are decoration/other-dungeon arenas not tied to a named boss here.
confidence: MEDIUM. GENUINE ROTF server. Best-documented finds: the DAMAGE-%-contribution + Token loot SYSTEMS (clear, repeated, useful for the project's loot model) and confirmation that the Pentaract Tower + Oryx realm-announcer exist on this server. LOW-new-content: no new buildable boss/taunt (Pentaract & Rock Construct are base-game; Oryx lines possibly canonical). Attacks approximate (edited). Recorded mainly to capture the custom loot-distribution system + Pentaract map, and to AVOID over-claiming the Oryx lines as ROTF-original.
